title: Global AI B2B Lead Enrichment input
description: Discover or crawl company websites, extract public B2B contact signals, detect digital gaps, score sales opportunity, recommend an offer, and generate outreach copy.

startUrls.title: Company website URLs
startUrls.description: Optional list of public company websites to crawl and enrich.

manualLeads.title: Manual leads
manualLeads.description: Optional JSON array of known leads. Each object can include businessName, website, category, city, country, phone, email, and notes.

discoveryProvider.title: Discovery provider
discoveryProvider.description: Optional search provider for finding company websites from queries.

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Optional list of search queries. If empty and a discovery provider is selected, queries are generated from countries and niches.

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: Countries used to generate search queries.

niches.title: High-value niches
niches.description: Business niches to target and score highly.

maxSearchResultsPerQuery.title: Max search results per query
maxSearchResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum URLs fetched per search query.

maxResults.title: Max output leads
maxResults.description: Maximum final leads pushed to dataset.

maxPagesPerWebsite.title: Max pages per website
maxPagesPerWebsite.description: Same-host pages to crawl for each website.

includePersonalEmails.title: Include personal-looking emails
includePersonalEmails.description: When false, prefer generic business emails such as info@, sales@, hello@, contact@.

outreachTone.title: Outreach tone
outreachTone.description: Tone used for generated outreach copy.

googleApiKey.title: Google API key
googleApiKey.description: Secret Google Custom Search JSON API key.

bingApiKey.title: Bing Web Search API key
bingApiKey.description: Secret Bing Web Search API key.

excludeDomains.title: Exclude domains
excludeDomains.description: Domains to exclude from discovery results.

debug.title: Debug output
debug.description: Include extraction evidence and diagnostics in each dataset item.
